arts.ttl: Nico Williams agreement ‘closer than ever’: Arsenal target gets INCREDIBLE contract
arts.sum: According to Tele Bilbao (via Estadio Deportivo ), Nico Williams is “closer than ever” to agreeing to stay with Athletic, where he has been offered a contract that will torpedo Arsenal’s chances of signing him for good. Nico Williams is ready to take a big decision over his future as interest from the Premier League, and particularly Arsenal, builds ahead of the summer transfer window.
